reason: Two of the change's claims VERIFY clean (good-fixture repair + diff-awareness), but the severity-pinning clause introduces a concrete recall-regression that the change does not close, so it should not ship as written. Verified-true parts: (1) the good fixture IS genuinely dirty -- dev.yml adds the redis block at 2-space indent UNDER `volumes:` (sibling to pgdata), not under `services:` (confirmed byte-level via cat -A on change.patch lines 9-17), so it parses as a malformed volume; baseline r0/r2 correctly flag this medium, the repair is justified. (2) r1's high IS a genuine diff-awareness hallucination -- it flagged 'redis scrape job has NO alert rule' while the same patch ADDS infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis_alerts.yml with a RedisDown alert (patch lines 85-100), so the diff-awareness clause is justified. THE DEFEAT: the prompt_rewrite pins 'SECONDARY parity gap (surface scraped but no alert) = MEDIUM (no block)'. The bad fixture bad/scrape-without-alert is, by name and content, exactly that class -- it adds `job_name: redis` with NO alert/dashboard -- yet it is left UNTOUCHED (fixture_edits only repairs the good fixture). With block_threshold=high, demoting this defect class to medium pushes scrape-without-alert below the block line, so a known-bad fixture (recall 3/3 high today: high+medium each repeat) would stop blocking -> recall regression on the agent's own corpus. Compounding the ambiguity: that fixture's snapshot is batteries:[] with NO redis-exporter service, so the added scrape target ALSO has no backing exporter -- it is simultaneously a PRIMARY wiring break (scrape with no exporter = HIGH per the change's own pinning) AND a SECONDARY parity gap (no alert = MEDIUM), and the change does not disambiguate which the reviewer should follow. Under the new deterministic pinning a reviewer can legitimately rate it MEDIUM and stop blocking. The change must either (a) re-target/clarify bad/scrape-without-alert so it stays a blocking PRIMARY break, or (b) defer the block_threshold per threshold-rederivation-001 before pinning this class to non-blocking. Refuted pending that fix.
